_readme: Team-editable verdict lines for PocketPanchangam. Apps fetch this on every launch and merge lines into the bundled pool — push to main and users get them within a day, no app release. Rules: sit must be one of [festival_eve, ekadashi, amavasya, pournami, only_abhijit, varjyam_morning, varjyam_late_night, rahu_commute, rahu_weekend, durmuhurtam_lunch, clear_day, average_day, panchami, dashami, dashami_friday]; tone one of [trad, straight, karam]; lang te or en; placeholders {wd} {fest} {start} {end} {mins} {vstart} {vend} {rstart} {rend} {dstart} {dend} {tend} are filled from real panchangam data. Max ~140 chars, no emojis. Voice rules & guardrails: docs/verdict-voice.md in the app repo — punch at the day, never at the tradition.
